info.title: Korean Self-Hosted ERP API
info.description: Bootstrap API for self-hosted Korean ERP/work platform

contentJson.description: Canonical JSON payload for template rendering
Canonical JSON payload for new version

versionNo.description: Version number to render (defaults to current version)

isDefault.description: Set as default asset for this user/type

attachmentFileIds.description: Attachment file IDs for generated request document

approverEmployeeIds.description: Approver employee IDs for auto-created approval line

autoCreateDocument.description: Auto-create request document and link it

attachmentFileIds.description: Attachment file IDs for generated request document

approverEmployeeIds.description: Approver employee IDs for auto-created approval line

autoCreateDocument.description: Auto-create correction document and link it

employeeId.description: Employee ID (admin roles only). If omitted, current user's active employee profile is used.

documentId.description: Linked document ID from document module

status.description: Initial claim status (APPROVED/POSTED are server-managed and rejected on create)

sourceFileId.description: Uploaded source FileObject ID (CSV or XLSX)

externalUserId.description: External user identifier from source system
